title: KITCH SQUARE CONTAINERS 250ML & 400ML 2PCE SET
features: The food containers come with an airtiight snap-lock lid, ensuring your food keeps fresh for longer
The food storage containers are microwave and dishwasher safe. Please note - Please remove lid from container before placing in microwave. The food containers are also freezer safe
description: These food storage containers with lids are the perfect addition to any home. The containers are made from durable plastic and are suitable for everyday use. Each container comes with an airtight sealed snap-lids.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Microwave safe (lid off), freezer safe, dishwasher safe
